stemHtml: Which of the following is the best definition of screening?

options.a: Placing suspicious baggage, cargo, or packages behind a screen in the passenger lounge for isolation purposes.
options.b: Using technology such as X-rays to detect drugs and similar substances.
options.c: Moving suspicious baggage, cargo, or packages airside, away from passengers.
options.d: Detecting weapons and explosives that could be used to commit acts of unlawful interference.
